scope.target: Consistency with already-canonical Handler, time, naming, and spec contracts

Preserve intentionally negative examples as clearly negative
Stop if a new universal decision is required

steps: Align best-practice and anti-pattern Handler examples

Correct method-naming and retained spec-compliance contract facts
Run focused structural and documentation contract tests
